goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description referring to "Austin Leather Belt" with composition. The certificate also explicitly refers to the invoice number 506470-3509. The invoice contains matching HS codes and product description 'Belt Women Leather 100%COW SPLIT LEATHER'. General goods description is accepted based on invoice reference and date match.

origin.motivation: Origin "Sweden" in certificate matches explicitly stated "Sweden" in invoice under 'Country of Origin of Goods' field after normalization. EU-normalization rules affirm match as well.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points match exactly or with allowed normalization. No mismatches or uncertainties detected. The document pair can be automatically approved.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikat och faktura. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan manuell granskning.
